reviews.review_title: The app that turned my son’s injury into
reviews.review_description:
My 13-year-old son plays for PDA in MLS Next and has been using Be Your Best daily since late March 2026. I want to share what this app has done for his development because I think other parents and players deserve to know.

When we started, his overall BYB IQ was 558. Three weeks later, his practice sessions are consistently hitting 690-741, with a peak of 741. His scan rate went from 0.59 to 0.85 scans per second. His decision-making jumped from the low 50s to 86% in his best session. These are not small improvements; this is a fundamentally different player emerging in front of our eyes.

My son is currently recovering from an Achilles injury and cannot train on the pitch. What could have been a devastating 6-week setback has instead become the most productive development period of his career. Every morning he puts on the headset and works on scanning; every evening he does match play. The injury took away his body but Be Your Best gave him a way to keep building his brain. When he returns to the field, he will come back with a faster mind than when he left.

What I appreciate most about this app is that it teaches the thing that separates elite players from good ones: seeing the pitch before the ball arrives. My son can dribble, he can finish, he can press. What he could not do before BYB was scan consistently; check over his shoulder before receiving; know whether to turn or play it back before the ball reached his feet. He is learning that now. The critical scan concept alone has changed how he thinks about the game.

We are using BYB as part of a broader development program that includes tactical workbook scenarios, film study, and speed chess for pattern recognition. But BYB is the centerpiece because it is the only tool that trains scanning at speed in a way that nothing else can replicate. You cannot teach a player to scan faster by talking about it; you have to put them in situations where scanning is the only way to succeed. That is what this app does.

A note on Match Play mode: it is still in beta and has some rough edges, but even in its current state it has been valuable. My son's match play BYB IQ went from 174 to 512 in three sessions. The gap between practice scores and match play scores is where the real development happens; being able to train in both modes is a genuine advantage.

To any parent or player reading this: if your child is serious about development, this app is worth every penny. It is not a game; it is a training tool that builds the cognitive side of football in a way that no amount of cone drills or wall passes can touch.

Thank you to the BYB team for building something that genuinely moves the needle. We are grateful.

— Father of a youth soccer player

developer_response.body:
Hi RZAruction,

Thank you so much for sharing your son's incredible journey with us!

We were so sorry to hear about his injury, but it is truly inspiring to see how he has turned this challenging injury period into a dedicated training period to sharpen his cognitive abilities. We are honored to play a part in his recovery and development.

Looking at the most recent numbers you mentioned, it’s clear he is a very high performer across our cognitive metrics. We have no doubt that when he returns to the pitch, he will be seeing the game at least one step ahead of where he was before.

We wish him a speedy recovery and a strong return to the season!

Best regards,
Erling from the Be Your Best Team

developer_response.body:
Hi Eray_pro,

I am sorry to hear that we gave you the impression the app is free, that is certainly not our intention. We are aiming to help players improve on the pitch as an additional training tool to help players train skills that are hard to train on their own, and to continue to build and improve the app to make it even better, we need revenue from the app sales. We understand that the current pricing can be a blocker for some users, and would like to make the app more accessible in the future when that is viable for us. 

Thanks for your understanding, and please do not hesitate to ger in touch with us at Contact@beyourbest.com if you have any questions or feedback. Wishing you a nice holiday period.

Sincerely,
Erling from Team Be Your Best

Erling from Team Be Your Best

The drills are smartly designed and interactive, making you feel like you're actually training on the pitch. The app focuses on the small details that make the difference between an average player and a top performer, helping you develop day by day.

I highly recommend Be Your Best to any ambitious player or even coaches looking for a modern, effective training tool. Truly a great and valuable experience all around!

reviews.review_description:
As a goalkeeper, I was genuinely excited to use Be Your Best — especially after seeing it endorsed by elite players and clubs. I invested in the Meta Quest headset and the subscription with the goal of improving my tactical awareness, distribution, and decision-making. Unfortunately, I’ve found the app to be extremely limited and not at all goalkeeper-friendly.

The entire platform is overwhelmingly focused on scanning and basic distribution, with very little relevance to the real depth of the goalkeeper position. There are no drills or challenges for core aspects like positioning, communication with defenders, when to come out for a 1v1, how to deal with through balls or crosses, or even how to command a defense. These are make-or-break elements of the role, and they’re completely missing.

Even the scanning/decision-making elements fall short. The app gives you a grade or percentage score but no actionable feedback. If you make the "wrong" decision, you’re not told why it was wrong or what would’ve been better — which makes meaningful improvement nearly impossible. For this price point, that’s a huge letdown.

It’s clear this app is currently built almost exclusively for outfield players, especially midfielders. For goalkeepers, it’s simply not worth the money in its current form. I’d love to see the developers actually invest in building position-specific modules — because without that, the app risks alienating a whole category of players.

Until then, I can't recommend it for goalkeepers and will be requesting a refund.

developer_response.body:
Hi Aven, 

Thank you for providing your honest review, and the detailed feedback about your experience with the training app as a goalkeeper. We will use your feedback as we continue to improve the experience for all positions on the pitch. 

If there is anything else we can do for you in the future, please do not hesitate to reach out to us again at contact@beyourbest.com. 

Sincerely, 
Erling from Team Be Your Best

reviews.review_description: As a practicing sports psychologist for a German Bundesliga club, I have had fantastic experience with the use of Be Your Best in the training of our talents. By training cognitive functions in isolation without any additional physical load, the software is perfect for taking the all too often overlooked muscle, our brain, to a new level. Through targeted training of scanning, game-specific perception and decision-making behavior, I have noticed noticeable improvements in our players on the pitch. In addition to the effectiveness of the training, which I am firmly convinced of, a training intervention with BYB has led to an increased awareness of the importance of scanning among our players. BYB is also a perfect tool for injured players to get them out on the pitch when they can't actually be there, thereby gaining (virtual) match practice and keeping the motor-cognitive connections fresh and intact. It also made the players feel much more motivated in their rehab program because they had this great additional activity. I firmly believe in the further integration of VR training into modern soccer training and BYB is the market leader in this. I am very excited about all the other promising features that BYB will implement. In short: 10/10 - absolute recommendation for all those who want to take themselves to a new level privately or for clubs that really mean it with a holistic approach to training!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for this amazing review, Nikinho17! 

We are delighted to hear that your players are getting such positive benefits from using the app and we look forward to develop new features to help your players even more in the future.  

Sincerely, 
Erling from Team Be Your Best

reviews.review_description: Hello be your best, I wanted to purchase an annual subscription  and keep my subscription ongoing for several years,  i had purchased a monthly subscription a few months ago but I looked at the prices and saw these prices were very expensive, I understand that this is how you make your income but if you could please sincerely read my message and make the prices cheaper so that more people would be able to afford it and keep an ongoing subscription for multiple years, more people will be able to buy it and keep longer subscriptions which would benefit not just us but also your Company.

As a professional football coach I always try
 to find new way for players development. This App is giving this valuable % to improve spacial awareness and decision making. My players enjoy it and find useful to integrate it on the pitch. For 10 minutes in VR I can get 30 decisions for my players during PRACTICE mode. Also have some specific work for different position.

From negative I would say sometimes can miss click and want to do different pass, but ball go different direction. Maybe need to spend more 
time for better technic execution.

developer_response.body:
Hi Kentuki,

Thanks for leaving this positive review! I am delighted to hear that your players are enjoying and improving from using the app. We always welcome constructive feedback on how we can improve, so I appreciate you letting us know about your experience with the passing controls. We will take it to heart and use it to improve. If there is anything else you would like to share with us, please do not hesitate to get in touch with us at contact@beyourbest.com. 

Best regards, 
Erling from Team Be Your Best

Hi Bruno,

Thank you for leaving a 5-star review of our app! I hope you have had a good experience like the rating indicates. If there is anything we can do for you to get even more out of your training, please do not hesitate to let me know at contact@beyourbest.com :) 

Sincerely,
Erling from Team Be Your Best

reviews.review_title: Great App but it has some issues
reviews.review_description: I have been training for a while and am very happy with my progress, however there's many things that should be fixed, mostly one from this latest update, which is the scan rate measure. I have noticed it is not counting all my scans and that is lowering my score a lot. I had an average 0.9 scans per second last month and now I think I have less than 0.7s/s. I have been watching my replays and have counted the scans myself, I realized the app is not counting all my scans. I have recordings of this and I would like to send it to you as feedback as it's something that needs to be fixed quickly. I am getting frustrated because of this and other issues and it really takes motivation off. Thanks.

developer_response.body:
Hi Sebastian,

Thank you for getting in touch with us and giving you feedback on the app!

Firstly, I am very happy to hear that you have been seeing good progress during your time with us. As for the issue you are raising, we are on it. The cause of the issue has been identified and we work to have it fixed as soon as possible. In the meantime, you can avoid being impacted by the bug by training in scenarios that do not have the awareness test, since this is the cause of the issue. To be precise, the awareness test increases the gameplay duration, which lowers the scan rate. 

If you have any other feedback to help us improve, feel free to let us know at contact@beyourbest.com. All feedback is appreciated. Thanks again. 

Edit: Hi Sebastian, we have just released a fix to the issue you were experiencing. Please let me know if there is anything else I can assist with. 

Best Regards,
Erling from Team Be Your Best

reviews.review_description: The movement is too bad, it looks lagged, very unrealistic. Honestly this app does not deserve a paid subscription, graphic quality is too low and the training options are very limited, I will not renew the membership but I feel that I lost 30 dollars.

Hi Jdmontoya,

I am sorry to hear that this was your experience with our training app.

Sincerely,
Erling from Team Be Your Best

reviews.review_description:
Before I begin, let's put things into perspective. A top-tier AAA VR game typically costs around $60. However, these guys are charging $29 per MONTH for this hot garbage! The movement of your player is abysmal! It feels as though you're gliding across the field, which can cause motion sickness. Both teammates' and opponents' movements and animations are highly unrealistic, with players gliding from the center circle to the top of the 18-yard box in just a few seconds (not even Mbappé is that fast!). The developers have also failed to accurately capture the flight and physics of the ball. All these issues negatively impact your ability to practice essential skills such as scanning and timing of scan, which is the main purpose of this game.

RECOMMENDATIONS:

I strongly recommend that the developers incorporate motion capture technology to achieve more realistic player movements and animations.
The flight and physics of the ball need significant improvement. There are numerous game engines available that could assist in this aspect.
Sorry for the harsh words but a product that is lazy, half-hearted, and overpriced should not be brought to market. Do better!!

developer_response.body:
Hi Akamakavel1,

Thank you for leaving a review with your honest feedback on the training experience. We are always looking for ways to improve the app and the training experience in general, so we will take your feedback to heart and use it as we continue to improve. 

We know that the current animations and physics system can prevent users from getting the most out of the training, and that is one of the reasons it is a continuous point on our list of development focus. It is also true that many of our users have seen real results from training with our app, from youth world cup champions to local club players. We are a small team that works very hard to make the best possible experience for our users, and we will continue to strive for that going forward.

Thanks again for taking the time to write a review. If you would like to, we could arrange a video call to further discuss your thoughts. If so, please contact us by email (contact@beyourbest.com). I hope you are having a good start to the new year.

Sincerely, 
Erling from Team Be Your Best

reviews.review_title: Don't Get Discouraged With The Reviews
reviews.review_description: As the title says don't get discouraged with the bad reviews, its still in Beta so that means its early, playable, but incomplete versions of a game. I may be wrong on that since i saw it on one of the modes but this right here is a GAME CHANGER. I love how it gives you clear data on your scan timing, awareness, critical scanning and scan rating. I won't lie though i can see where people are coming from with the prices & the player movement especially on Match Play mode. Its quite difficult to move yourself on that game mode and the movement from the opponent isn't the best. As for the pricing i think it should be a little bit more affordable that way they can attract more people to trying the game since the Vr Headsets are quite expensive. Other than that the game is amazing and will only get better as time goes on ! Don't hesitate to try it out, i bought a used VR headset just so i can try this out & so far i haven't been dissapointed.

developer_response.body:
Hi Gerardo,

As you mention we are continuously working to improve the training experience for you. Please do not hesitate to reach out to us at contact@beyourbest.com with any additional feedback or requests. Providing feedback is a great way for you to influence what we do next and it is great for us to make sure that what we develop brings value to our user base. 

Thank you again for taking the time to write such a detailed review.

Sincerely, 
Erling from Team Be Your Best

reviews.review_description:
I'm an academy player in the UK and I've recently started using Be Your Best game at home. I needed help to improve my scanning as I'm a Central Midfielder.
I can definitely say this game is improving my awareness when it comes to match days and I'm able to make quicker and positive decisions. 

Even if I'm physically tired on my days off, I'm still able to train my scanning from the comfort of home. 

Loving the gains!

reviews.review_description: This is overall a great game, but the one thing that is missing for me is the ability to move around. In game the character moves for you and you have to scan and position yourself to make the right decision to pass or shoot. I have had a great time so far, and I would recommend this game.

Thanks for the great feedback! Please stay tuned as we will soon be starting a closed beta for our new "Match Play" AI tech were you will train your skills in dynamic scenarios with total control of the player. The open beta will follow soon after.

The Be Your Best team.

reviews.review_title: Loving the Be Your Best Pro app
reviews.review_description: My son (2011) plays competitive soccer and is loving the Be Your Best Pro app. It has improved his scanning on the field and field/game awareness. He is still in the learning process with the soccer IQ app, but he loves the different competitive scenarios it provides including leveling up as he achieves higher scores.

Best Regards,
Erling from Team Be Your Best

reviews.review_description: Good training tool but completely overpriced. It’s so poorly optimized so you lag the whole time and they claim they are working to add updates etc but they update like once every 3 months. Match play is unusable it’s getting like 20 fps and there is no tactical understanding from the ai so it’s pretty much just ball chasing the entire 5 minutes and there’s no replay for it, calling for a pass doesn’t work. Maybe they could get more purchases by charging a time fee instead of a subscription and in turn would get more money to put towards development

developer_response.body:
Hi Joseph, 

Thank you for leaving a review. I am happy you like the training tool, but I am sorry to hear about your other experiences. Our team here at Be Your Best work very hard every day to improve the training tool, but being the first to develop this sort of tool is a huge task. That being said, we are just about to release an update that will improve some of the things you mentioned in your feedback, adding replay to MatchPlay among others. Thank you for the constructive feedback, we will take it into account for our continued development. 

Sincerely, 
Erling from Team Be Your Best
